target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Structural collapse evident with >75% of building mass reduced to rubble; remaining walls are fragmented and non-load-bearing; no intact framing visible.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed structural collapse, >75% mass reduced to rubble, and no intact framing. The scene depicts a single ruined structure with collapsed walls, exposed internal framing, and a large pile of debris at its base, set against a barren landscape. The destruction indicates the building is no longer functional for any purpose.
